title: Grants.gov — Federal Funding Database
content: Grants.gov is the U.S. federal government's central clearinghouse for finding and applying to federal grant opportunities from all federal grant-making agencies. Morgan State investigators use Grants.gov to locate federal funding announcements (NOFOs) and submit grant applications routed through ORA. Search by agency, CFDA number, eligibility, or keyword at https://www.grants.gov/.
